title: Chat Tabs
description: Client-side Fabric mod that adds tabbed chat with automatic channel switching. Filter messages by Global, Local, and Private channels.
body:
# Chat Tabs

A lightweight **client-side** Fabric mod that adds a tabbed chat interface to Minecraft. Automatically sorts messages into channels like Global, Local, and Private messages.

## Features

- **Tabbed Chat Interface** - Switch between chat channels with clickable tabs
- **Automatic Sorting** - Messages are automatically categorized based on command prefixes
- **Channel Support** - Works with /g (global), /l (local), and /tell (private)
- **Clean UI** - Minimal, non-intrusive tab bar above the chat
- **Lightweight** - Client-side only, no server installation needed

## Supported Channels

| Tab | Commands | Description |
|-----|----------|-------------|
| All | - | Shows all messages |
| Global | /g | Server-wide chat |
| Local | /l | Nearby players |
| Private | /tell, /msg | Direct messages |

## How to Use

1. Install the mod and join a server
2. Chat tabs appear above the chat window
3. Click a tab to filter messages by channel
4. Type commands as usual - messages auto-sort

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21+
- Fabric Loader 0.16.0+
- Fabric API
- Java 21+

## Compatibility

- Works with servers using standard chat channel plugins
- Compatible with other client-side mods
- Server-side installation not required

---

*Found a bug or have a suggestion? Open an issue on GitHub!*
